caption: Wandering through the misty, ancient stone ruins of Angkor Wat at sunrise, feeling the electric energy of this place seep into my skin. There’s something so raw and untamed about these temples, and I love matching that vibe. My silhouette against the golden light is all I needed to make the perfect shot. 🌅✨ #TravelGoddess #AngkorWat #SoloTravel #SensualVibes
